ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-29-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 2,2002.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Robert Penkiss, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, M. Snow. The Court considered the Declaration of Steven Amaral, Director of Credit & Collections, in support of Default Judgment, and good cause appearing grants default as follows: Principal: $49,263.36; Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,504.00; Fees: $660.00; Costs: $350.00 for a total judgment of $59,727.86. Judgment signed in open court.
